checks.description: Boundary-value stimulation must not rely on undocumented fixed latency; the design must eventually reflect correct output for edge inputs.
checks.pass_condition: For any edge-case operand values applied, the module eventually produces a stable sum and asserts o_en, without assuming a specific cycle count.
checks.trigger_condition: When edge-case values are driven on adda and addb with i_en asserted.

checks.description: When i_en is asserted with concrete operand values, the adder must eventually output the exact sum on result and assert o_en.
checks.pass_condition: result equals (adda + addb) and o_en == 1 after any number of cycles following the operation, without requiring a fixed-cycle guarantee.
checks.trigger_condition: When i_en transitions high with valid adda and addb values.
